response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, leadership, and open-source contributions, aligning well with the Head of Development role. His background includes architectural design, team mentorship, and strategic project management across diverse tech stacks. However, his German proficiency is only basic, which could impact client-facing responsibilities, and his open-source focus leans more toward development than leadership.
strengths: Strong technical leadership with experience in full-stack development and architecture design
Proven track record in team mentorship and tech community engagement (e.g., workshops, talks)
Diverse expertise across languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, Dlang, Python) and open-source project contributions
concerns: German language proficiency is only at a basic level, which may hinder client interactions
Limited explicit experience in requirements management and UML modeling for complex IT systems
No clear evidence of large-scale IT security, risk management, or compliance leadership in past roles
